title: Smoking, vaping and tobacco - Canada.ca
content:
## Smoking, vaping and tobacco
Learn about vaping, tobacco products, effects of smoking, second-hand smoke, prevention and quitting.
- Quitting smoking: Provincial and territorial services
- Health-related messages for all tobacco product packaging: Health warnings on packages

## Services and information

### Quit with Confidence
Quit with Confidence is a self-paced resource that can support you along your quit journey and equipped you with the knowledge and skills to quit smoking with confidence.

### Health effects of smoking and second-hand smoke
Information on the health risks of smoking and exposure to second-hand smoke.

### Preventing kids and teens from smoking and vaping
How to talk about smoking and vaping with kids and teens and how to make your home and car smoke-free.

### Understanding vaping
About vaping, vaping vs. smoking, risks of vaping, vaping product safety and regulation.

### Surveys, statistics and research
Information on trends and patterns of tobacco and vaping product use and related research activities.

### Regulating tobacco and vaping products
Information on the regulation of the manufacturing, sale, labelling and promotion of tobacco and vaping products.

### Canada’s tobacco strategy
The current federal strategy to address tobacco use in Canada, designed to help achieve the target of less than 5% tobacco use by 2035.

### Business and industry
Information and resources for the tobacco and vaping industry on requirements under the Tobacco and Vaping Products Act, including the Tobacco Charges Regulations .

### Tools for a smoke-free life
Tools and support to help you quit smoking
Encouraging youth to consider the consequences of vaping

### Delivering Results: Advancing Canada's Tobacco Strategy
CTS progress report: key achievements, challenges and data trends, and areas of focus moving forward

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
